concepts.headline: Anthropic opens in Milan.
concepts.subtext: Europe is Anthropic's fastest growing region, with revenue up 9x year over year.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a 1200x630px warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. Headline sits at 52px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, anchored to the left with 72px left padding, positioned in the upper-center vertical zone. A thin 2px warm sand (#d7c8af) accent bar sits 24px above the headline, spanning 48px wide, fading to transparent right. Subtext at 18px, weight 400, color #555, placed 28px below the headline with max-width 520px. A small DM Mono eyebrow label reading 'ANTHROPIC / EUROPE' in 11px, letter-spacing 0.08em, color #888 sits 20px above the accent bar. The FLYWHEEL wordmark anchors bottom-left at 13px DM Mono uppercase, color #888. Right half of the canvas (600-1152px) holds a sparse particle dot network: 14-18 gray circles at 3-6px diameter, 0.08-0.14 opacity, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, suggesting a European city network map. Bottom-right carries a faint geographic node cluster. 60%+ of canvas is negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots rgba(107,122,124,0.10), structural hairlines rgba(107,122,124,0.12), FLYWHEEL mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: A single headline plus one supporting stat is all this announcement needs. The 9x revenue figure is the real proof point; the subtext delivers it crisply. The particle dot network on the right half evokes the expanding European hub map without any illustration.

concepts.headline: Anthropic doubles down on Europe.
concepts.subtext: New Milan office adds to a growing network of European hubs.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on a 1200x630px white (#ffffff) canvas with 72px perimeter padding. Eyebrow label 'ANTHROPIC / EXPANSION' in DM Mono 11px, uppercase, #888, letter-spacing 0.08em, top-left. Headline at 48px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, color #111, below eyebrow with 16px gap, max-width 560px. A 2px warm sand accent bar (80px wide, fading right) sits beneath the headline with 20px gap. Subtext at 17px, #555, 20px below accent bar, max-width 480px. Three stat tiles arranged in a horizontal row starting at left, 36px below subtext. Each tile is a square-cornered (#f0efe9 background, 1px #e5e5e5 border) box 240px wide, 110px tall with 24px internal padding. Stat value in DM Mono 38px, weight 400, color #111. Stat label in DM Mono 11px, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.07em, color #666. Tiles spaced 16px apart. FLYWHEEL mark bottom-left in DM Mono 12px, #888. Right of the tile row, sparse particle dots fill peripheral space at 0.08 opacity.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, surface #faf9f6, card surface #f0efe9, structural border #e5e5e5, headline #111, subtext #555, stat values #111, stat labels #666, eyebrow #888, accent bar #d7c8af, warm shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25) on stat tiles.
concepts.reasoning: Three clean data points (9x growth, 6 hubs, fastest region) make a compelling proof-of-scale story. Square stat tiles with DM Mono numerals align with Flywheel's data-driven editorial voice while the sparse layout maintains the required negative space.

concepts.headline: Europe is Anthropic's fastest growing region.
concepts.subtext: Revenue up 9x year over year. Milan joins London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, and Munich.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on a 1200x630px warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. FLYWHEEL watermark centered behind all content at 140px bold uppercase, opacity 0.03, color #000. All content centered on a single vertical axis. Eyebrow label 'BREAKING' in DM Mono 11px, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.09em, color #888, centered near top third. Headline at 54px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, centered, max-width 640px, allowing natural line breaks at a logical point. A 2px warm sand (#d7c8af) horizontal rule 56px wide centered sits 22px below the headline. Subtext at 17px, weight 400, color #555, centered, max-width 500px, 20px below the rule. FLYWHEEL wordmark centered at the bottom in DM Mono 12px, uppercase, #888. Particle dot network floats at the far left and right canvas edges only, at 0.07 opacity, never overlapping the centered text block. Warm sand box shadow on the subtext zone: rgba(215,200,175,0.25) 0px 4px 20px.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, watermark rgba(0,0,0,0.03), headline #111, rule #d7c8af, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, FLYWHEEL mark #888, peripheral dots rgba(107,122,124,0.07).
concepts.reasoning: The headline itself is the entire story. Centering it as a stark declaration with generous negative space on all sides gives it the gravitas of a publication cover. The warm watermark and minimal subtext maintain Flywheel's editorial restraint.

selection_reasoning: Concept 0 (headline_subtext_card) best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. It communicates the core news (Milan opening) and the single most compelling proof point (9x YoY growth) without over-engineering the layout. The left-anchored hero with particle dot network on the right delivers the required asymmetric tension and 60%+ negative space. The multi-stat panel in concept 1 risks feeling like a marketing tile deck; the bold statement in concept 2 works but the headline exceeds the ideal punchy length. Concept 0 is the most considered and deliberate of the three.
